paragraphs.text: Let's go! We offer classes for advanced dance and drama students who want to develop their talents to a really high level. Our expert teachers will work with you on your acting and your preferred dance style so that you are ready to compete against the best!

Mouse House. We welcome all levels of ability and experience, and offer drama classes for children of all ages, led by professional performers. The activities are fun and great for building self-confidence, so you are soon ready to enter competitions. We meet every Saturday and parents are welcome to wait in the hall.

The Phoenix Group. With us, you'll take part in weekend drama workshops, and receive a free ticket per term to watch a play at the local theatre. You'll have opportunities to perform to the public throughout the year. No experience is necessary, but you will need to book a term in advance.

Monsters DC. This group is for young people under 16 who want to develop their acting ability, or for more experienced actors who want to teach other children. All our members are encouraged to take part in our annual show, and every month you can meet successful actors and get their advice on a career in acting.

Peppermint Performers. Working with experienced theatre directors, you'll learn performance skills through a year-long programme of workshops. The first term is a series of skills-based sessions covering a range of different performance styles, with certificates for successful students. In future terms, you'll take part in plays performed for the general public.

Moon Productions. In our classes, we teach jazz, tap and street dance, and you'll soon be creating your own dances. We hold contests against other clubs and put on displays for parents every summer. Want to find out what life as a professional dancer is like? Every term we invite a star to talk about their career.

The Focus Group. Classes are available every evening. You'll receive excellent training in dance and drama, and develop techniques and performance skills in no time. One-to-one tuition is offered, and it's possible to work towards a certificate. You'll also have the opportunity to take part in a professional play.

Bubble Company. Just come along with your friends and we'll do the rest. There's no need to have any experience, and we provide all the costumes and special dance shoes if you need them. We run small hour-long classes in dance or drama every evening after school, and family members are welcome to stay and watch.

questions.sentence: Maiko loves dancing and wants to learn new dance styles quickly. She'd like to meet successful dancers and also take part in competitions.
questions.explanation: Đáp án F vì Moon Productions dạy jazz, tap và street dance, giúp học sinh nhanh chóng học thêm các phong cách nhảy mới. Nhóm này cũng có contests against other clubs, tức là có thi đấu với các câu lạc bộ khác, và every term we invite a star to talk about their career, tương ứng với việc Maiko muốn gặp những vũ công thành công.
: new dance styles quickly - jazz, tap and street dance; take part in competitions - hold contests; meet successful dancers - invite a star.

questions.sentence: Marta and her younger sister would like to join an acting group at the weekend. They haven't done anything like this before, so their mum wants to go with them at first.
questions.explanation: Đáp án B vì Mouse House phù hợp với beginners - all levels of ability and experience, tổ chức vào cuối tuần - every Saturday, và phụ huynh có thể đi cùng chờ ở đó - parents are welcome to wait in the hall. Đây là lựa chọn khớp nhất với việc hai chị em chưa có kinh nghiệm và mẹ muốn đi cùng lúc đầu.
: at the weekend - every Saturday; haven't done anything like this before - all levels of ability and experience; mum wants to go with them - parents are welcome to wait.

questions.sentence: Eliana's quite nervous so would like the possibility of some drama training on her own at first. She's free during the week and hopes to act in a play one day.
questions.explanation: Đáp án G vì The Focus Group có classes are available every evening, nghĩa là học vào các ngày trong tuần. Nhóm này còn có one-to-one tuition, rất phù hợp với việc Eliana muốn được học riêng trước vì còn thiếu tự tin. Ngoài ra, students also have the opportunity to take part in a professional play, đúng với mong muốn được diễn trong một vở kịch sau này.
: nervous - one-to-one tuition; free during the week - every evening; hopes to act in a play - take part in a professional play.

questions.sentence: Henri is an experienced dancer who enjoys entering competitions. He wants to concentrate on jazz dance and improve his drama skills too.
questions.explanation: Đáp án A vì Let's go! dành cho advanced dance and drama students, tức là học sinh đã ở trình độ cao, rất hợp với Henri là một experienced dancer. Nhóm này cũng giúp học cả acting và preferred dance style, nên phù hợp với việc Henri muốn tập trung vào jazz dance và cải thiện kỹ năng kịch. Cụm so that you are ready to compete against the best khớp với việc cậu ấy thích thi đấu.
: experienced dancer - advanced students; enjoys entering competitions - ready to compete; improve his drama skills too - acting and dance.

questions.sentence: José wants to perform in plays, and is interested in joining an acting course run by professionals with a diploma at the end.
questions.explanation: Đáp án E vì Peppermint Performers do experienced theatre directors hướng dẫn, tức là khóa học do những người làm nghề chuyên nghiệp phụ trách. Nhóm này có certificates for successful students, tương ứng với ý diploma at the end. Ngoài ra, in future terms, you'll take part in plays performed for the general public, đúng với mong muốn được diễn kịch của José.
: run by professionals - experienced theatre directors; diploma at the end - certificates; wants to perform in plays - take part in plays.

paragraphs.text: Bennachie Park is an area of great natural beauty and very popular with photographers and artists. There is a sculpture trail through the forest, and a famous waterfall, and both of these can be reached on foot or by mountain bike. You can hire bikes from the Visitor Centre.

Wilder Forest has a huge web of paths for walkers, runners and mountain bikers, and you can also do horse riding (booking required). There are beginners' sessions available in drawing nature with painter, John Small, and a new event that starts after dark will introduce you to the stars.

Strathmoor Forest Park is very popular both with people who want to enjoy relaxed walking and with birdwatchers who come to see rare birds found only in Strathmoor. There's a small café, and several picnic sites for those who prefer to bring their own food.

Thornielee Park is a wonderful place for a family day out with walks, two large lakes, and many picnic sites where you can enjoy the views. It's popular with animal lovers and has daily bird-photography drop-in sessions with our expert, Sarah Wallis.

At Glengarry Forest, there is a new storytelling event for children, called 'Deep in the Forest'. Then there are many regular activities and events, including the ever-popular horse riding and night-cycling with torches. The food at the Visitor Centre café is excellent and won a prize last year.

If you love nature, Innerleithen Forest is for you! There are several rare kinds of animals and birds, and a daily talk on them from an expert at the Visitor Centre. You can also get cosy in the café, which serves cake and warm drinks. Many people bring mountain bikes or can hire them and go around the forest trails.

Boden Forest is excellent for walking and running, and there's also a 10-metre cliff face with climbing classes for beginners. A regular birdsong event takes place, including birdwatching from inside a special hut. Very popular for lunch is the food stall serving mushrooms grown there and fish from Boden.

Kiroughtree Park has everything from a visitor centre - where you can pick up a free guide full of information about the plants and animals there - to a wonderful lake, where you can have a go at sailing. Short landscape photography sessions are also available.

questions.sentence: Julian wants to take pictures of wildlife but needs some advice. He likes to be near water and also wants somewhere that has outdoor eating facilities.
questions.explanation: Đáp án D vì Thornielee Park có daily bird-photography drop-in sessions with our expert, nghĩa là Julian vừa được chụp ảnh động vật hoang dã vừa có người hướng dẫn. Nơi này cũng có two large lakes, phù hợp với việc cậu ấy thích ở gần nước, và many picnic sites, đúng với yêu cầu có chỗ ăn uống ngoài trời.
: take pictures of wildlife but needs some advice - bird-photography sessions with our expert; near water - two large lakes; outdoor eating facilities - picnic sites.

questions.sentence: Marcie and her mum want to spend a day in a forest and get some exercise at the same time. They would like to be told about the wildlife there, and enjoy snacks and refreshments in comfort.
questions.explanation: Đáp án F vì Innerleithen Forest có daily talk on animals and birds from an expert, đúng với việc họ muốn được giới thiệu về động vật hoang dã. Ở đây cũng có café phục vụ cake and warm drinks, phù hợp với yêu cầu ăn nhẹ và uống đồ trong không gian thoải mái. Ngoài ra còn có forest trails và có thể đi xe đạp quanh rừng, đáp ứng nhu cầu vận động.
: get some exercise - forest trails / bikes; be told about the wildlife - daily talk from an expert; snacks and refreshments in comfort - café with cake and warm drinks.

questions.sentence: Mohammed wants a day full of activities including something that involves his two main interests, sport and animals. He also wants to try an art class and to stay for a night-time activity too.
questions.explanation: Đáp án B vì Wilder Forest có nhiều hoạt động thể thao như walking, running, mountain biking và horse riding. Nơi này cũng có drawing nature sessions, phù hợp với yêu cầu thử một lớp nghệ thuật. Cuối cùng, a new event that starts after dark will introduce you to the stars khớp với mong muốn ở lại tham gia hoạt động buổi tối.
: sport - walkers, runners, mountain bikers, horse riding; art class - drawing nature; night-time activity - starts after dark. Yếu tố animals có thể gắn với horse riding.

questions.sentence: Maria wants to be able to read about the wildlife and also to take pictures of trees and hills. She loves being outdoors and would like to try a watersport of some kind.
questions.explanation: Đáp án H vì Kiroughtree Park có free guide full of information about the plants and animals there, nên Maria có thể đọc thông tin về động vật hoang dã. Nơi này cũng có short landscape photography sessions, phù hợp với việc chụp cây cối và đồi núi. Ngoài ra, at the lake, you can have a go at sailing, đúng với mong muốn thử một môn thể thao dưới nước.
: read about the wildlife - free guide; take pictures of trees and hills - landscape photography sessions; watersport - sailing.

questions.sentence: Ivan and his dad want an activity that involves seeing and hearing wildlife. They also want to do an adventure sport and to try food that comes directly from the local forest.
questions.explanation: Đáp án G vì Boden Forest có birdsong event và birdwatching from inside a special hut, nên họ vừa có thể nghe vừa có thể nhìn động vật hoang dã. Ở đây còn có climbing classes for beginners, phù hợp với yêu cầu về một môn thể thao mạo hiểm. Phần food stall serving mushrooms grown there and fish from Boden khớp với ý muốn thử đồ ăn lấy trực tiếp từ khu rừng địa phương.
: seeing and hearing wildlife - birdsong event / birdwatching; adventure sport - climbing; food from the local forest - mushrooms grown there and fish from Boden.

title: Best beaches for a day out

paragraphs.text: Tantsin Beach is one of the biggest sandy beaches in the area - suitable for all ages. The beach resort overlooks the bay, which is full of colourful fish and is popular for kayaking. There is a small, calm section of the bay with lifeguards to watch the swimmers, and also several eating places serving local fish dishes all day long.

Eastlee Beach. Walking on the sand, listening to the waves and passing the wonderful selection of coffee shops and fish restaurants, it is easy to see why Eastlee Beach is so popular. Visitors love taking boat trips around the bay to see the historic lighthouses. Afternoon surfing lessons are also on offer for teenagers.

Hatton Beach. Lively and popular, with excellent restaurants serving locally-caught fish, Hatton Beach is a great place for surfing, though not suitable for beginners. The beach's sandy dunes lead down to several surfing, fishing, diving and water-skiing spots that are considered to be some of the finest in the area.

Dunley Town Beach. On a trip to Dunley Town Beach, visitors will not only see the ocean and bay but also a 14th-century castle on the hill. This fishing town has a quiet family beach, and classical concerts are held in the castle's Great Hall most evenings.

North Beach. On this part of the coast, sunbathers, sand sculptors and younger swimmers all enjoy the same sand and sea. North Beach is a good place to have a surfing lesson in the morning, when the waves are smaller. In front of the beach clubhouse there are fun games and activities for children and teenagers to enjoy.

Manou Beach. Manou Beach, with its seafront cafés and hotels, is popular with families. The sea is not suitable for swimming or water sports, but beach volleyball matches are organised for different age groups all through the day. Take a trip on a boat to try and catch salmon out at sea (we'll always be back before lunch time), take a dolphin-watching cruise, or visit the town museum.

Maryland Beach. As the largest sandy beach along the coast, Maryland Beach is the West Coast's top vacation spot. The whole area is busy with summertime action: wonderful places for water sports, a water park, games for all ages, and even live entertainment on the beach.

Kaloa Beach. Located on the East Coast, Kaloa has a magnificent beach. With its soft white sand, palm trees and clear, calm blue water, this beach is a natural choice for sun lovers, water sports enthusiasts and families in search of safe, sandy fun and games.

questions.sentence: Joe's family want to go fishing in the morning. His parents would like to spend their afternoon learning about the history of the area while Joe takes part in a sports activity with other teenagers.
questions.explanation: Đáp án F vì Manou Beach có boat trip để câu cá ngoài biển và luôn quay về trước giờ ăn trưa, nên phù hợp với yêu cầu đi fishing in the morning. Buổi chiều, bố mẹ Joe có thể visit the town museum, tương ứng với learning about the history of the area, còn Joe có thể tham gia beach volleyball matches organised for different age groups, tức là hoạt động thể thao cùng các bạn cùng độ tuổi.

: go fishing in the morning - catch salmon out at sea / back before lunch; learning about the history - visit the town museum; sports activity with other teenagers - beach volleyball matches. Paraphrase: history of the area = town museum; sports activity with other teenagers = volleyball matches for different age groups.

questions.sentence: Tom and his father are very good surfers and are looking for a beach with challenging waves. They'd also like to do some other water sports and want to eat some fresh fish for dinner.
questions.explanation: Đáp án C vì Hatton Beach là nơi great place for surfing nhưng not suitable for beginners, cho thấy sóng ở đây khá khó và hợp với người lướt sóng giỏi. Ngoài ra, bãi biển này còn có fishing, diving and water-skiing spots, đúng với yêu cầu làm thêm các môn thể thao nước khác. Phần excellent restaurants serving locally-caught fish khớp với mong muốn ăn cá tươi vào bữa tối.

: very good surfers / challenging waves - not suitable for beginners; other water sports - diving and water-skiing; fresh fish for dinner - locally-caught fish. Paraphrase: challenging waves = not suitable for beginners; fresh fish = locally-caught fish.

questions.sentence: Zara and her family are interested in seeing ocean wildlife. The children would like to try surfing and they all want to keep their afternoon free for lying on the beach.
questions.explanation: Đáp án E vì North Beach có surfing lesson in the morning, khi waves are smaller, nên trẻ em có thể thử lướt sóng vào buổi sáng và vẫn giữ afternoon free. Tuy E không nói trực tiếp về ocean wildlife, nhưng so với các lựa chọn khác trong key, đây là lựa chọn khớp nhất với phần lịch trình surfing buổi sáng và buổi chiều rảnh để nghỉ trên bãi biển.

: try surfing - surfing lesson; keep their afternoon free - in the morning. Paraphrase: have the afternoon free = do the activity in the morning. Lưu ý: câu này dựa theo đáp án gốc, dù chi tiết seeing ocean wildlife không được nêu rõ bằng các lựa chọn khác.

questions.sentence: Jinnie's family need a beach with safe swimming areas for her younger sister, near a café offering good lunches. They want plenty of space so they can enjoy playing games together.
questions.explanation: Đáp án A vì Tantsin Beach là one of the biggest sandy beaches in the area, nên có plenty of space cho cả gia đình chơi cùng nhau. Ở đây còn có a small, calm section of the bay with lifeguards to watch the swimmers, rất phù hợp với younger sister cần khu bơi an toàn. Thêm nữa, several eating places serving local fish dishes all day long đáp ứng yêu cầu có chỗ ăn trưa gần đó.

: safe swimming areas - small, calm section / lifeguards; café offering good lunches - several eating places; plenty of space - one of the biggest sandy beaches. Paraphrase: safe for younger sister = calm section with lifeguards; plenty of space = one of the biggest beaches.

questions.sentence: Matt and his family all want to go to a popular beach where they can watch an outdoor show or concert as well as do some fun activities.
questions.explanation: Đáp án G vì Maryland Beach là top vacation spot và whole area is busy with summertime action, cho thấy đây là một bãi biển nổi tiếng và sôi động. Ở đây có games for all ages và a water park, phù hợp với yêu cầu có các hoạt động vui chơi. Cụm live entertainment on the beach khớp trực tiếp với ý watch an outdoor show or concert.

: popular beach - top vacation spot; fun activities - water park / games for all ages; outdoor show or concert - live entertainment on the beach. Paraphrase: outdoor show or concert = live entertainment.

paragraphs.text: Frida's farm isn't only famous for top-quality ice cream, but home-made cakes too - taste a range of them while you're here! Have a go at making ice cream yourself, adding whatever you fancy, from chocolate to vegetables! A perfect birthday activity - and there's an indoor playground for young children, too!

Henry's has used the same methods for 50 years to produce first-class ice cream and celebration cakes! Based in an old country farmhouse, the building was the site of several interesting historical events. Visit the cows that produce our milk, and hear our plans for remaining environmentally friendly.

Denton's has made ice cream since 1900, and is one of the country's favourites! The tour includes a talk about how Denton's was set up and how the business has developed over the years. The shop has great gifts and, in the café, try our strange but delicious ice cream varieties, including pea and blue cheese!

At Horley's, we still make ice cream and cakes the same way it's been done for a hundred years. Help bake cakes in the visitors' kitchen, and record a Horley's ad on a DVD you can keep! Visit the beautiful 18th-century farmhouse, and meet the cows that produce our milk!

At Carswell's, visitors will enjoy walking through the huge gardens and young children will love the animals at Pets' Corner. In the factory building, try our many flavours of ice cream, and get a souvenir from the fantastic shop - including some free ice cream!

Giulio's factory is famous for its beautiful gardens and fantastic children's activities! Come and watch how ice cream is made, starting with collecting the milk. See machines turn it into ice cream, and finally, eat some! And if it's an important celebration, we'll make an ice-cream cake just for you!

Vascombe's has made ice cream for 100 years - and it's always been delicious! See everything we do - from caring for our animals and the surrounding environment, to producing a variety of popular ice cream flavours! Try our delicious cakes and ice cream, and get a souvenir T-shirt to take home with you!

Jacobson's is based in what was once the largest cotton factory in the area, designed by a well-known 19th-century architect. The factory now operates completely on wind power, and has won prizes for its recycling methods. Visit the lab where food scientists develop delicious and unusual flavours, and try making your own ice cream!

questions.sentence: Sandro wants to visit a factory where they'll organise something special for his birthday, and where he'll see everything that's involved in producing ice cream. His parents want to spend some time outdoors during their visit.
questions.explanation: Đáp án F vì Giulio's có beautiful gardens, nên bố mẹ Sandro có thể spend some time outdoors. Ở đây còn cho visitors watch how ice cream is made, starting with collecting the milk, rồi xem machines turn it into ice cream, tức là thấy toàn bộ quá trình sản xuất. Cụm if it's an important celebration, we'll make an ice-cream cake just for you rất phù hợp với birthday của Sandro.

: organise something special for his birthday - make an ice-cream cake just for you; see everything involved in producing ice cream - watch how ice cream is made from collecting milk to final product; spend some time outdoors - beautiful gardens. Paraphrase: birthday activity = important celebration; full production process = starting with collecting the milk ... turn it into ice cream.

questions.sentence: Jana's family would like to go to a factory that makes ice cream using traditional methods. Jana wants to try out different activities there, and make something that she can take home.
questions.explanation: Đáp án D vì Horley's vẫn làm ice cream and cakes the same way it's been done for a hundred years, đúng với traditional methods. Jana cũng có thể help bake cakes và record a Horley's ad on a DVD you can keep, tức là có nhiều hoạt động để thử và có món mang về nhà.

: traditional methods - the same way it's been done for a hundred years; try out different activities - help bake cakes / record an ad; make something that she can take home - DVD you can keep. Paraphrase: traditional = same way for a hundred years; take home = keep.

questions.sentence: Kem wants to see a factory that cares about its effects on the environment, and would like to find out how new flavours are invented. His dad enjoys visiting historically interesting buildings.
questions.explanation: Đáp án H vì Jacobson's operates completely on wind power và has won prizes for its recycling methods, thể hiện rõ việc quan tâm tới môi trường. Ở đây còn có lab where food scientists develop delicious and unusual flavours, đúng với ý muốn tìm hiểu new flavours are invented. Ngoài ra, nơi này từng là the largest cotton factory in the area và do a well-known 19th-century architect thiết kế, rất hợp với bố của Kem thích các công trình có giá trị lịch sử.

: cares about the environment - wind power / recycling methods; how new flavours are invented - lab where scientists develop flavours; historically interesting buildings - once the largest cotton factory / 19th-century architect. Paraphrase: effects on the environment = wind power and recycling; invented = develop.

questions.sentence: Luisa would like to create her own ice cream using a variety of ingredients. Her mum wants to try other products the factory makes, and find something to entertain Luisa's small sister.
questions.explanation: Đáp án A vì Frida's cho visitors make ice cream yourself, adding whatever you fancy, from chocolate to vegetables, đúng với việc Luisa muốn tự tạo kem bằng nhiều nguyên liệu khác nhau. Mẹ của Luisa có thể taste a range of home-made cakes, tức là thử những sản phẩm khác ngoài kem. Cuối cùng, there's an indoor playground for young children, rất phù hợp để giải trí cho em gái nhỏ của Luisa.

: create her own ice cream - make ice cream yourself; variety of ingredients - adding whatever you fancy; other products - home-made cakes; entertain small sister - indoor playground. Paraphrase: a variety of ingredients = whatever you fancy; entertain = indoor playground.

questions.sentence: Matty would like to visit a factory where they produce ice cream with unusual flavours, and buy a souvenir there. His mum wants to find out about the history of the company.
questions.explanation: Đáp án C vì Denton's có strange but delicious ice cream varieties, including pea and blue cheese, rõ ràng là unusual flavours. Ở đây cũng có shop has great gifts, phù hợp với việc mua đồ lưu niệm. Ngoài ra, the tour includes a talk about how Denton's was set up and how the business has developed over the years, đúng với yêu cầu của mẹ Matty muốn tìm hiểu lịch sử công ty.

: unusual flavours - pea and blue cheese; buy a souvenir - great gifts; history of the company - how Denton's was set up and developed over the years. Paraphrase: unusual = strange but delicious; history = how it was set up and developed.
